title: Illager Siege Weapons
description: Adds Illager siege weapons and small armies across the world
body:
**This mod adds various Illager siege weapons and small armies across the world.**

![Siege](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4992be5f095d714234d70f5ff6e1d29236476e7.jpeg)

Spawns:
Different siege weapons can generate in the Plains, Snowy Plains, Desert, Savanna, and Taiga biomes.

![Siege](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/917414d681e331f7f44919be862c026d36d8f4a9.jpeg)

Illagers:
Each siege weapon is guarded by various Illagers—including Pillagers, Vindicators, and an Evoker—who protect the machines.

![Siege](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f37d90abbfd38c42d61cba465737cebc8431251a.jpeg)

Loot:
Larger siege weapons contain valuable items and special rewards for anyone who defeats the Illagers.

![Siege](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef03a79cecc9f165b6d51cfc6ac9e5daa1f04bf8.jpeg)
 

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
